'''Westport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], located near [[Kishi]] and a modest distance southwest of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].

==History==
[[File:The_area_around_the_Imperial_Palace.png|thumb|right|250px|The area around the starport]]
Westport began construction in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], and opened in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]. Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it saw a 6,000% increase in departures from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] due to the rising [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. A few years later, within hours of [[Ando/Legends|Ando's]] secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], 500 [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] living on Coruscant booked tickets for departure from Westport.

After the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Westport was rebuilt and installed new landing platforms, which were made especially for escort carriers. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] brought an increase to the spaceport's arrivals from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to Coruscant due to the full-scale war which was about to take place.

Of the known spaceports on Coruscant, Westport appeared to be the most successful in the long run, as [[Newport]] went out of business, and [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]] was destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and never rebuilt.
